calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-01-2013 Vacated

Ntc Of Mtn To Dismiss, Motion To Dismiss For Failure To Join Necessary Parties
Off Calendar Sep-24-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
James C. Ward, Esq. of Law Offices of Roger L. Meredith, (415-616-5959), for Naomi Sanders, Defendant and moving party.
No appearance by Plaintiff and opposing party.

Brief discussion of the motion between Court and Defendant's counsel is held. RULING: DEFENDANT NAOMI SANDERS' Motion To Dismiss For Failure To Join Necessary Parties is GRANTED with prejudice. Order is signed in open court. Judge Harry Dorfman, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-20-2013 Continued To Nov-18-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Ntc Of Mtn To Dismiss, Motion To Dismiss For Failure To Join Necessary Parties
Off Calendar Aug-30-2013 Continued To Sep-24-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT NAOMI SANDERS' Motion To Dismiss For Failure To Join Necessary Parties is transferred to Department 501, the Real Property/Housing Court, to be heard on September 24, 2013, at 9:30 a.m. See Local Rule 8.10. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Leave To Amend Def'S Verified Answer To Second Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jul-29-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: JAMES WAA, ESQ., 415.616.5959, FOR DEFENDANT NAOMI SANDERS; No other appearances.

RULING: matter discussed. The moving party provided a copy of the moving papers before hearing. DEFENDANT NAOMI SANDERS' Motion For Leave To Amend Defendant's Verified Answer To 2nd Amended Complaint is granted. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-27-2013 Set For Trial On Sep-23-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-16-2013 Set For Order To Show Cause On Mar-19-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-15-2012 Continued To Jan-30-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-09-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:
DEFENDANT NAOMI SANDERS' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is off calendar. See Local Rule 6.2B. The defendant failed to provide a complete courtesy copy of the moving papers, including a proof of service. Judge: Marla Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 = (302/MJM)
